ai_phase.role:
You are a Senior Full-Stack Engineer and System Architect.
Focus ONLY on Phase 1: Foundation & Database Architecture.
Work iteratively under Tech Lead guidance.
ai_phase.responsibilities: - Initialize project structure - Design scalable architecture - Setup database schema - Prepare system for future Elasticsearch integration

task.name: Project Initialization
task.requirements: - Initialize monorepo structure - Setup backend (Express + Prisma) - Setup frontend (Next.js + TailwindCSS) - Setup PostgreSQL using Docker - Prepare environment configuration (.env)
task.expected_output: - Terminal commands (step-by-step) - Folder structure (tree format) - docker-compose.yml (PostgreSQL only) - .env example - Minimal boilerplate (no business logic)
task.constraints: - Keep minimal but production-ready - Do NOT implement authentication - Do NOT add unnecessary libraries

task.name: Database Schema Design (Prisma)

requirements.article: title, content (rich text: JSON/HTML) authorId, categoryId status, views

task.expected_output: - Full prisma/schema.prisma - Explanation: - Category self-relation - Article ↔ Tag many-to-many
task.constraints: - Follow Prisma best practices - Proper naming conventions - Ensure scalability

task.name: Authentication & Role-based Middleware
task.requirements: - Use jsonwebtoken and bcrypt - Implement: - register (hash password) - login (return JWT) - Middleware: - authenticateUser - authorizeRoles(...roles)
task.expected_output: - Folder structure: /controllers /routes /middlewares - Code for: - register - login - JWT middleware - role-based authorization
task.constraints: - Follow clean architecture - Use async/await - Proper error handling

ai_phase.ui_awareness:
Backend must be designed to support future UI:
- Article list with pagination - Search bar (Elasticsearch later) - Category filtering
- Rich text editor - Category selection - Tag input
